name: 10-Band Parametric EQ (audio chain v1)
author: KB2UKA
description: 10-band parametric EQ — first of the Zeus voice audio chain v1 blocks per issue #332. Per-band frequency / gain / Q + bypass. Cascaded biquad peaking filters per the RBJ Audio EQ Cookbook. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency. Live combined transfer-function curve, rotary knobs, segmented LED meters in Zeus tokens.
